sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90328" key="prosflegmai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσφλεγμαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n90328.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inflame as well</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
